description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/gopherburrow/golang-git. Define a single test stage with a job named test. In the test job run the exact script commands: export PACKAGE="${CI_PROJECT_URL#https://}", export PACKAGE_DIR="${GOPATH}/src/${PACKAGE}", export PACKAGE_PARENT_DIR="${PACKAGE_DIR%/*}", mkdir -p "${PACKAGE_PARENT_DIR}", ln -s "${CI_PROJECT_DIR}" "${PACKAGE_DIR}", cd "${PACKAGE_DIR}" ; go get ./... ; cd "${CI_PROJECT_DIR}", and then go test -cover ${PACKAGE}. The job runs on the default test stage with no caches, artifacts, or special rules.
